phase: Phase 3: Level 2 - Focus & Habit (COMPLETE) — Bug Hardening Session
current_status: Completed a full bug hardening session on Phase 3. Fixed three separate Supabase 409 FK violation errors across chat_sessions, user_streaks (dashboard, streak calendar, profile hook). Root cause was all call sites reading a stale localStorage profile.id (auth user ID) instead of the auto-generated profiles.id UUID. Fixed by implementing resolveUserId() in studyChatbotHelpers.js and resolveProfileId() in gamification.js — shared async self-healing utilities. Also fixed a runtime TypeError in useNoteSelection.js caused by selectionchange firing with e.target = Document (no .closest() method) by splitting the handler into two dedicated callbacks. All fixes verified with clean production build (0 errors). Mobile responsiveness for Level 2 dashboard and chat page fully intact.
